
### usepgfplotslibrary(fillbetween)

### deeper pipeline  {.smaller}

\\countStyles{} \\circuitStyles{} 

::: {.r-stack}
![](/pipeline/texfig/deeperPipelineLib.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/deeperPipelineLib.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/pipeline/texfig/deeperPipelineLib.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/pipeline/texfig/deeperPipelineLib.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/pipeline/texfig/deeperPipelineLib.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}

![](/pipeline/texfig/deeperPipelineLib.figure-6.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=6}

![](/pipeline/texfig/deeperPipelineLib.figure-7.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=7}

![](/pipeline/texfig/deeperPipelineLib.figure-8.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=8}


:::
 
<div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index=9 >
 
<hr class="vspace" /> 

* Problem: [How much faster can we get?]{.fragment fragment-index=10 .custom .myem-only}
* Problem: [Can we even do this?]{.fragment fragment-index=11 .custom .myem-only}
 
</div>
